title.en: Fire Emblem War Ancestor said secretly.

content.en:
"Light-clothed saintess, so strong!!"

Many people were shocked, killing the Yongyuan Holy Son in one move, this is too exaggerated.

Although the Yongyuan Holy Son had lost to the five Saints before, at least he held on for a while, and of course it was not ruled out that the five Saints had not made a full move.

But the light-clothed saintess killed the Yongyuan Holy Son in one move, which means that the strength gap between the two sides is very large.

"It's the unique holy skill of the Holy Maiden Sect - Sword Star! This holy skill is very demanding, and you must have the holy endowment of the attack type to be sure of practicing it, and the light-clothed holy girl has not only practiced it, but also cultivated to the consummation realm, it must be that its holy endowment is very compatible with the holy skill of the Sword Star!"

Fire Emblem War Ancestor said secretly.

He didn't know that the Light-clothed Saintess had two holy endowments, but it could be inferred from the consummation-level Sword Star Saint Technique that she was showing that her strength was very strong, and she was afraid that she was stronger than the other five great saints.

Of course, anyone has hole cards, and no one knows who is the first in this holy war until it is fully revealed.

"This time, we don't have a chance to win the first place!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor said regretfully.

There's no way, there is no Holy Endowment in the Battle Gate this time.

Although some of the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate tried to give birth to heirs, at their level, it was too difficult to rely on natural fertility to give birth to heirs, but if they were forcibly conceived, it would be impossible for the born heirs to have the Holy Endower, which was the result of countless experiments.

Therefore, the battle gate has always wanted to cultivate a saint-endowed person, but failed.

In short, the saint-endowed person pays attention to luck and cannot be forced.

Without the Holy Gifted Son, how can he compete with these six Holy Endowments?

Although there are examples of non-saints killing saints, that is after becoming the Supreme Domain Ancestor.

Before becoming a Supreme Ancestor, the Holy Endowment could easily crush all non-Holy Endowments.

--------------

"This woman is so strong!"

Several other saints were extremely jealous, and obviously regarded the light-clothed saint as their biggest competitor.

After all, even if they had a holy maiden, it would be difficult for them to find a holy technique that was completely suitable for them.

Moreover, even if it is more suitable for oneself, it is even more difficult to cultivate a holy technique to the consummation realm.

The gap between the Great Success-level Holy Technique and the Consummation-level Holy Skill is not a star and a half, but a big one.

The light-clothed saintess successfully challenged the Yongyuan Holy Son, but she did not immediately challenge those saints, but continued to wait and see.

Anyway, the third round can't end so quickly, just wait slowly, this doesn't need to be rushed.

Even if you really challenge the first place, you will still face the challenges of others, and only in the end can you decide the first place.

Then.

Ye Tian was also ready to challenge, and he didn't bother to directly challenge the people behind him, wasting the opportunity to challenge.

And the direct choice challenge -

"I choose to challenge the Eternal Yuan Holy Son!"

Ye Tian said.

Wow!

Everyone's eyes were staring at Ye Tian, and they all felt incredible.

"How dare he?"

Kamigawa Son was stunned.

How powerful the Yongyuan Holy Son is, even if he is defeated by the six Holy Endowments, his strength is still far superior to that of these Holy Sons!

Not to mention him, even the Star Feather Holy Son and the other two mysterious Holy Sons of the Battle Gate are not the opponents of the Yongyuan Holy Son.

This time, the battle gate is afraid that there is not even a single holy son who has entered the top ten.

But Ye Tian was so bold as to challenge the Yongyuan Holy Son.

Although it is just a waste of a challenge opportunity, if you lose miserably like this, you will lose face!

"Hmph, it's okay, you're embarrassed, I'm happy!"

When the Holy Son of Kamigawa thought of this, his heart was much happier.

As for whether Ye Tian will win?

He didn't think about it!

Because according to his investigation of Ye Tian, Ye Tian is definitely not a holy endowment, and the time to break through to the Unified Realm is not long, so how can he compete with the Yongyuan Holy Son?

The Holy Maiden of Zhenyuan Holy Land, Mingyu Daozu, also participated in this holy war, although she was eliminated early, it did not prevent her from continuing to watch the battle.

At this moment, she was dumbfounded when she saw Ye Tian challenging the Yongyuan Holy Son.

At the beginning, she knew Ye Tian's cultivation level, she was only in the realm of all things, and she barely had the strength of the Sevenfold One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, which was far inferior to her, but it was only as an Extreme Dao inheritor that she had cultivated the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, which shocked her.

But for her, Ye Tian is definitely far from being able to grow up this time, and it is difficult to get any good rankings.

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian directly challenged the Yongyuan Holy Son.

"It's too reckless, such a challenge will completely offend the Eternal Yuan Holy Son!"

Mingyu Daozu shook his head and said.

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor of the Battle Gate stared at Ye Tian, and he naturally paid attention to Ye Tian.

At the beginning, it was he who agreed to Ye Tian's request for multiple holy skill inheritances.

Of course, he didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to practice holy skills, but that the inheritor of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body was qualified to obtain the inheritance of multiple holy skills, even if he didn't get any good rankings this time, his potential alone was enough for the battle gate to cultivate.

Therefore, Ye Tian wanted to inherit many holy skills, and the battle gate would be given.

For the Invincible Domain Ancestors, the Holy Skill Inheritance is indeed precious, but for a Supreme Domain Ancestor like him, it is not a big deal to have a few Holy Skill Inheritance.

This is the difference in strength and vision.

......

"You dare to challenge me?"

Yongyuan Holy Son's mentality was a little broken, and now someone is challenging him.

Before, those six holy endowments were all hidden holy sons of the major holy gates, and it was normal for him not to understand the situation.

But about Ye Tian, the Holy Son, the Holy Son of Yongyuan really knew about it.

In fact, the Holy Son of the Double Transcendent of the Major Holy Gates, he knew all about it.

What I know about Ye Tian is that the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws, the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, and the Extreme Dao Inheritor, the others are gone.

For an ordinary Holy Son, being able to practice into a Mixed Yuan Holy Body is indeed very demonic, but for him, it is rubbish!

As long as he is not a saint endowment, he is not afraid of anyone, even if Ye Tian cultivates the Mixed Yuan Holy Body to the consummation realm, he is not afraid at all, and can even easily defeat him.

And is Ye Tian a saint-endowed person?

"Hmph, a lucky person from a small realm has a probability of 0 being a saint-endowed person!"

Yongyuan Holy Son thought to himself.

This time, he was ready to crush Ye Tian fiercely and show his invincible combat power under the Holy Endower.

Ye Tian and Yongyuan Holy Son came to power.

This time, Ye Tian would no longer hide the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, if he hid it again, and did not use the Holy Technique, he really couldn't beat the Yongyuan Holy Son.

Rumble!!!!!

Eternal Immortal Eucharistic erupts.

The power of the Holy Communion in the late stage of the Dacheng level was fully displayed, and the terrifying coercion permeated the ring.

At this moment, the audience was shocked!
